creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239641
Screenshot: Bugzilla accepting kern@

The address is valid (autocompleted) for assignee and CC purposes, however: 

* the validity is questionable

– e.g. bsdimp#3605 at <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/757305573866733680/1058969233767288832>

> I don't think kern@ is a valid address... addresses aren't verified...

----

If kern@ is a valid email address: should it ever be used for kern bugs? 

<https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/describecomponents.cgi?product=Base%20System> shows bugs@ by default.
